problem_statement:
Rolling smoke test is crashing on exit
On rolling, the smoke test crashes during destruction of the executor, causing a test failure. Something my have changed upstream that causes this behavior. We have to fix this such that PR status checks are working reliably again.

                       "Service \"%s\" (%s) may not decode correctly in clients",
